series_metadata.series_description: Copies of proposal history (e.g., every proposal formally presented at the bargaining table), bargaining minutes or notes taken by the designated note taker(s), and tentative agreements. For fact-finding, pre-hearing statements, fact-finding proposals, fact-finding exhibits, transcript or notes from the proceeding, post-hearing briefs, and the report and recommendation of the fact-finder. For conciliation, pre-hearing statements, conciliation proposals, conciliation exhibits, transcript or notes from the proceeding, post-hearing briefs, and the conciliation report.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Permanent retention in office area. ; Paper: Permanent retention in office area., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Permanent
